name: a7_github_bot_pr
description: A7 (M15) — account pull source. Captured GitHub API payloads (a bot-authored PR + a human commit) replay through the REAL transformers and bus. A cloud coding agent that opened a PR lands as an AGENT_REPORT with source.kind=agent and identity agent:<login> ('what my agents did in the cloud'); a teammate's commit lands as a remote AGENT_REPORT (kind=remote, identity github:<login>). Both carry the repo remote so they attribute to the project, and the prose appears in the journal.

commit.message:
Fix the parser edge case

long body ignored
